sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30514" key="e)gresi/kwmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγρεσί-κωμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n30514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stirring up to revelry</tr_>, epith. of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
